# MO Goalkeeping

> Goalkeeper coaching on the Suffolk/Essex border. Group sessions, 1-2-1 coaching, and specialist club services for players of all ages and abilities, run by Mike — a qualified goalkeeper coach based in Halstead, Essex.

## Services

- [Goalkeeper Coaching](https://mogoalkeeping.co.uk/goalkeeper-coaching/): Overview of all coaching services, including group sessions and 1-2-1 coaching across Suffolk and Essex.
- [Club MO/GK](https://mogoalkeeping.co.uk/goalkeeper-coaching/club-mo-gk/): Regular group goalkeeper coaching sessions open to all ages and abilities. Sessions run in and around Halstead, Colchester, Braintree, Sudbury, and Bury St Edmunds.

## Resources

- [Coaching Resources](https://mogoalkeeping.co.uk/resources/): Session plans and training resources for goalkeepers and coaches, including the 2024 Goalkeeper Session Compendium.

## Info

- [About](https://mogoalkeeping.co.uk/about/): About Mike and the MO Goalkeeping story.
- [Blog](https://mogoalkeeping.co.uk/blog/): Coaching insights, session reviews, and articles on goalkeeping.
- [Enquire](https://mogoalkeeping.co.uk/enquire/): Contact form for coaching enquiries. Covers an approximate 12-mile radius of Halstead.
